title: Saw V
actors: Scott Patterson, Costas Mandylor, Tobin Bell
plot: Following Jigsaw's grisly demise, Mark Hoffman is commended as a hero, but Agent Strahm is suspicious, and delves into Hoffman's past. Meanwhile, another group of people are put through a series of gruesome tests.

title: La La Land
actors: Ryan Gosling, Emma Stone, Rosemarie DeWitt
plot: When Sebastian, a pianist, and Mia, an actress, follow their passion and achieve success in their respective fields, they find themselves torn between their love for each other and their careers.

title: Vivre sa vie
actors: Anna Karina, Sady Rebbot, André S. Labarthe
plot: Twelve episodic tales in the life of a Parisian woman and her slow descent into prostitution.

title: The Ghost and the Darkness
actors: Michael Douglas, Val Kilmer, Tom Wilkinson
plot: A bridge engineer and an experienced old hunter begin a hunt for two lions after they start attacking local construction workers.
